title: Axis of Evil, the Old and the New
meta_description: Axis of Evil, the Old and the New - "The aim of both Axis of Evil, the old and the new, is directed at the Islam!"  “Axis of evil” was first introduced by...
contents:
"The aim of both Axis of Evil, the old and the new, is directed at the Islam!"

“Axis of evil” was first introduced by U.S. President George W. Bush and was referred to Iran, Iraq, and North Korea. As result of it, Iraq fell.

The new Axis of Evil which hasn’t been officially announced but with its scope already surfaced, will include Russia, China, North Korea and Iran. A result of it highly likely will be, Iran will fall.

The aim of both Axis of Evil, old and new, is directed at the Islam.

Additionally, to pin elements of socialism beliefs to Islam in attempt to relate and to explain the cause of violence works in favor of this, to paint a red target for a kill zone.

Redirect the hate for the evil socialism to Islam and take down the intended target, whose dirty work is that?

By spreading this false rationale, whose dirty laundry we’re helping of doing?

For the Chinese either in or outside of the mainland who wishes to see the fall of the socialist dictatorship, the CCP, they may be disappointed because the outcome of the new Axis of Evil or the WWIII, is highly likely NOT intended to remove the CCP, but to remove the Islamic counter forces which has been considered a fierce opposite from what the U.S. puppet-supports in the Mideast. If the CCP does fall during the phase, it will be a byproduct, not specifically intended but inevitable.

Many Chinese begged for a promise to take down the CCP, their enthusiasm might be simmered down by the fact that a direct hit was not going to aimed at the Asian socialist dictatorship. What they’ll see next is a war at the expense of further weakening the Islam counter forces for the benefit of a particular ongoing project which is condemned by most and disapproved by the world yet is puppet-supported by the U.S..
